data.name: Backshot Brothel
data.detailed_description:
Game Overview

Backshot Brothel is a an exciting adult sex game with trainer elements. Play as an Arch-devil king that is hell bent on corrupting his royal court members. Appoint them as everything from maids to glory hole workers. Become a legendary Arch-devil king!

Manage Your Brothel

  • Assign the women in your court as whores and earn gold.

  • Interact with them daily to corrupt them and make them sluts.

Corrupt Women

  • Interview women at your throne and decide if they have the physical attributes to work in your brothel.

  • The women come in the following personality types:

    • Stoic

    • Shy

    • Tsundere

    • Airhead

    • Sweet

    • Brash

Train Women

  • Train women in your court to become more adept at the tasks that you assign them.

  • The women can have the following jobs:

    • Bartender

    • Inn Keeper

    • Librarian

    • Maid

    • Backshot Specialist

    • Glory Hole Worker

Features

  • Stamina Management

  • 3D Generative Women

  • Backshots

  • Corruption

  • Dice Rolls

  • Trainer mechanics

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Microsoft Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel(R) Core(TM) i3 6300
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 660
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
